# Sensitivity Analysis for Observational Studies

::: {.callout-note}
## Drafting note
Chapter content in progress. Migrate the corresponding text here; use `$...$` / `$$...$$` for math, place figures in `images/`, and use ```{r} or ```{python} code blocks.
:::

## Sensitivity analysis in observational studies

_To be added._

## Unmeasured confounding

_To be added._

## Negative controls

_To be added._
